headline: PTC Showcases Bobcat's Use of the Intelligent Product Lifecycle at Hannover Messe 2026
summary: PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) PTC today announced it will demonstrate how Bobcat, a leading global manufacturer of compact equipment, can leverage the Intelligent Product Lifecycle to improve the development process of an excavator at Hannover Messe (HM) 2026. By creating a centralized product data foundation that connects design, engineering, and operations and enables AI-driven transformation, Bobcat can reduce time, errors, and rework across highly complex products and processes.

thumbnail.caption: Brand-new Bobcat E17z mini excavator packed with smart features, more power, and a fresh design.
